title: S.A.M Mod Manifest
description: Manifest (mod.json) for a Support-All-Mods content pack. Declares the mod's identity, its S.A.M framework requirements, and the class/item/plugin files it ships. S.A.M reads this at launch to load the mod.

$schema.description: Optional. URL of this JSON Schema, so editors (VS Code, etc.) give autocomplete + validation as you type. Ignored by S.A.M itself.

namespace.description: Unique lowercase mod namespace. Every class and item id in this mod is prefixed with it (e.g. 'darkblade' -> 'darkblade:assassin').

name.description: Human-readable mod name shown to players and in the workshop listing.

author.description: Name or handle of the mod author.

version.description: This mod's version in MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH form (e.g. '1.0.0').

framework_min_version.description: Minimum S.A.M framework version this mod needs, in MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH form. If S.A.M is older, the mod is loaded anyway with a warning (it may use features that aren't present yet) — S.A.M never hard-blocks on a version mismatch.

framework_max_version.description: Optional. Highest S.A.M version this mod was built for. If S.A.M is newer, the mod is loaded anyway with a warning (a breaking S.A.M change may affect it).

barony_min_version.description: Optional. Minimum Barony version this mod targets (e.g. "5.0.0"). If the running Barony is older, the mod is loaded anyway with a warning.

barony_max_version.description: Optional. Highest Barony version this mod targets (e.g. "5.9.9"). If the running Barony is newer, the mod is loaded anyway with a warning.

incompatible_with_barony_version.description: Optional, rare. An exact Barony version this mod is KNOWN to be broken on. This is the only version field that hard-blocks: if it matches the running Barony version, the mod is skipped (logged) instead of loaded.

dependencies.description: Namespaces of other S.A.M mods that must load before this one. Optionally pin a minimum version with 'namespace@1.0.0'.

items.description: A dependency namespace, optionally version-pinned as 'namespace@MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH'.

classes.description: Relative paths (from the mod folder) to class definition JSON files provided by this mod.

items.description: Path to a class JSON file conforming to class.schema.json.
Relative paths (from the mod folder) to item/weapon definition JSON files provided by this mod.
Path to an item JSON file conforming to item.schema.json.

patches.description: Relative paths (from the mod folder) to layered-patch JSON files. Patches ADDITIVELY modify existing vanilla data files (e.g. items/items.json) without replacing them, so multiple mods can edit the same file and stack instead of conflicting. Each file conforms to patch.schema.json.

items.description: Path to a patch JSON file conforming to patch.schema.json.

plugins.description: Relative paths to compiled plugin .dll files (advanced; loaded by the S.A.M plugin system). Most mods leave this empty.

items.description: Path to a compiled S.A.M plugin DLL.

description.description: Short description of what the mod adds, shown to players.

examples.name: Darkblade Pack
examples.author: coolmodder
examples.description: Adds the Assassin class and a set of shadow-themed weapons.
